ham: Hello, your MSEB electricity bill of Rs. 2,350 is due on 15th Sep. Please pay via the MSEB app or your bank to avoid disconnection. Thanks!
spam: Dear Customer, MSEB has detected an abnormally high usage on your F O C (fictitious) account. To prevent disc on 10th Sep, KYC must be updated. Fill in details at <URL> and submit your photo ID. This is urgent, otherwise your ACCNT will be halted. Reply YES to proceed.
